objective: Build the first structured dataset of AI-assisted work observations and use it to refine domain/state/template/agent registries.
recommended_next_action: Run assistant-work dataset genesis: create observation schema examples for chat, IDE, UI, docs, tests, review, cloud agent, PR agent, and background execution.
inputs: User correction: specialist DOMAINS and agents are needed for UI, docs, IDE-agent work, and mass AI coding workflows.
deliverables: assistant-work route simulation covering dataset entries
acceptance_criteria: At least 25 observation entries covering chat, IDE, CLI, cloud/background, PR/review, UI, docs, tests, debug, release, data, dependency, and security workflows.
Every observation maps to domains, state surfaces, protocols, templates, specialist agents, proof, and settlement path.
At least 10 failure modes are classified.
At least 10 template gaps and 10 agent/domain gaps are proposed.
No accepted canon, registry, or product-front-door mutation occurs without explicit acceptance.
non_claims: It does not authorize registry landing or product mutation.
It does not claim external telemetry or private user data collection.
